entry.title: Standart ODATA PATCH Method not updating
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are trying to use the ODATA API https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BILLINGDOCUMENT_0001-v1/resource/Header PATCH Method for update one field on Billing Document, we are getting HTTP 200 OK, but the field was not updated.

URL: /sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_billingdocument/srvd_a2x/sap/billingdocument/0001/BillingDocument('90000000')

 

Body(payload):

{
  "CityCode" : "NY"

}

HTTP Method: PATCH

 

=>> Attachment below.

Please, any tips?

 

Thanks a lot!!!

entry.title: Custom Field not available in SAP Standart ODATA API Activated
entry.content:
Hi Guys!

We have added a Custom Field "Link" to vf03 transaction, Billing Document Header Details.

We have activated the standard Billing Document ODATA https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BILLINGDOCUMENT_0001-v1/resource/Header,  but the Custom Field "Link" is no appearing in the metadata.

We need this field to be available in this ODATA Standart https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BILLINGDOCUMENT_0001-v1/resource/Header that we have activated.

 

=>> Attachment below.

Please, any tips?

 

Thanks a lot!!!

entry.title: Need explanation of SAP support of oData interface
entry.content:
Please help supply understanding of SAP's implementation of OData as applied to publication of CDS views.
 
We have found the following URL to list the Service Catalog of a SAP system:
 
eg.  https://sap.mysys.com:44300/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/servicecollection 
 
Once identified from the Service Catalog listing, individual CDS views can be called by their specific URLs:
 
eg.  https://sap.mysys.com:44300/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZCV_ODATA_ACDOCA_MTD_CDS/ 
 
This is different from the behavior of commercial oData services we are familiar with. We normally call a base URL:
 
eg.  https://services.odata.org/V3/Northwind/Northwind.svc/ 
 
Which allows navigation to individual tables within it:
 
eg.  https://services.odata.org/OData/OData.svc/Products 
 
Is there some way to organize SAP to publish a base URL listing tables in the normal oData way? 
 
We are using S/4 HANA 1909.

entry.title: ABAP RAP and oData v4 max items (or growing threshold) is not available
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to change the growing threshold of the object page table in a RAP application using OData v4 (as recommended, to the best of my knowledge).

The annotation @ui.presentationVariant with maxItems is not working. I also tried editing the page in Visual Studio Code through the page editor, but the Growing threshold attribute does not exist (I assume this is because I am using OData v4).

"So be it," I thought. No worries—I can create a controller extension and change this parameter with JavaScript. But no! Controller extensions are not available with OData v4.

Am I missing something? The default growing threshold on the object page is 10, which is quite limited.

Why is OData v4 missing so many features?

entry.title: Cannot find "Saltuation" field in OData service.
entry.content:
I'm using the SAP Odata service (we have s4/hana) to create new business partners. I've found all the fields that I need to map data for except one: On the main business partner screen there is a field called "Salutation". I can't find it.

I've exported the entire OData Business Partner structure into a metadata file and the only thing I've seen with the name Salutation under the main Business Partner entity is is "BPFinancialServicesExtn". There's a field called "BPLetterSalutation".

I've done a GET call on many of the business partners that use this Salutation field and it's definately not stored in this field. In fact I've expanded every single child element inside the Business Partner Odata service for these business partners and the value we store in this SALUTATION field isn't available in ANY of the data. Does anyone know where this is mapped to?

entry.title: Delta extraction in RAP odata service
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a CDS view named Z_MATPLANT with CDC annotations for delta extraction on table MARC. It runs fine in the test program RODPS_REPL_TEST as I can see delta records only.
Now I am trying to expose this Z_MATPLANT view in an odata service by creating RAP Service Definition and Service Binding on SAP premise.

Then I test it in Postman but it returns full data only without delta (even with prefer:odata.track-changes in header).

How do I go about this delta issue in RAP odata service? Since Full Extract is working in RAP already, I am trying not going through FactsOf and DeltaLinksOfFacts in SEGW if possible.

Thanks in advance,

Hung Nguyen

entry.title: Duplicate item on binding in SAPUI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am facing issues with my SAPUI5 application; the data is duplicated in the binding. I am using OData v4 created from my CDS. I've created CDS in Eclipse to get Journal Entry Items based on G/l Line Items. I'm using I_GLAccountLineItem and I_JournalEntryItem to get the data, below is my CDS code:

### CDS in Eclipse

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZGLITEMS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'General Ledger Line Items'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define root view ZGL_LINE_ITEMS
as select distinct from I_GLAccountLineItem as GlLineItem

association [0..1] to I_JournalEntryItem as _toJournalEntryItem
on GlLineItem.AccountingDocument = _toJournalEntryItem.AccountingDocument
and GlLineItem.FiscalYear = _toJournalEntryItem.FiscalYear
and GlLineItem.Ledger = _toJournalEntryItem.Ledger
and GlLineItem.GLAccount <> _toJournalEntryItem.GLAccount
and GlLineItem.DebitCreditCode <> _toJournalEntryItem.DebitCreditCode

association [0..1] to I_User as _toUser
on GlLineItem.AccountingDocCreatedByUser = _toUser.UserID

{
key GlLineItem.CompanyCode as CompanyCode,
key GlLineItem.AccountingDocument as AccDoc,
GlLineItem.PostingDate as PostingDate,
GlLineItem.FiscalPeriod as Period,
GlLineItem.FiscalYear as FisYear,
GlLineItem.Ledger as Ledger,
GlLineItem.GLAccount as GlAccount,
GlLineItem.DocumentItemText as Description,
_toJournalEntryItem.GLAccount as OpposingGLAccount,
GlLineItem.DebitCreditCode as DebitCreditCode,
GlLineItem.CompanyCodeCurrency as Currency,

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
GlLineItem.AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency as AmountInGlLineItem,

// Summing amounts for the GL account
@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
sum(_toJournalEntryItem.AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency) as AmountInJournalEntry,

GlLineItem.AccountingDocCreatedByUser as CreatedBy,
_toUser.UserDescription as CreatedByDesc,

// Associations
_toJournalEntryItem,
_toUser
}
where
GlLineItem.Ledger = '0L'
group by
GlLineItem.CompanyCode,
GlLineItem.AccountingDocument,
GlLineItem.PostingDate,
GlLineItem.FiscalPeriod,
GlLineItem.FiscalYear,
GlLineItem.Ledger,
GlLineItem.GLAccount,
GlLineItem.DocumentItemText,
_toJournalEntryItem.GLAccount,
GlLineItem.DebitCreditCode,
GlLineItem.CompanyCodeCurrency,
GlLineItem.AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency,
GlLineItem.AccountingDocCreatedByUser,
_toUser.UserDescription;

### Main.view.xml

<mvc:View controllerName="laporankas.laporankas.controller.Main"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:uxap="sap.uxap"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    height="100%">
    <uxap:ObjectPageLayout
        id="idObjectPageLayout"
        showHeaderContent="true"
        toggleHeaderOnTitleClick="true"
        upperCaseAnchorBar="false"
        showFooter="true">
        <uxap:headerTitle>
            <uxap:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle id="idObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle">
                <uxap:expandedHeading>
                    <Title text="Laporan Kas" wrapping="true" />
                </uxap:expandedHeading>
                <uxap:snappedHeading>
                    <Title text="Laporan Kas" wrapping="true" />
                </uxap:snappedHeading>
                <uxap:expandedContent>
                    <Text text="{glRange>/glAccountFrom} - {glRange>/glAccountTo}" />
                </uxap:expandedContent>
                <uxap:snappedContent>
                    <Text text="{glRange>/glAccountFrom} - {glRange>/glAccountTo}" />
                </uxap:snappedContent>
            </uxap:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle>
        </uxap:headerTitle>
        <uxap:headerContent>
            <HBox alignItems="End">
                <VBox>
                    <Label text="G/L Account" />
                    <ComboBox
                        id="idGlDataSetComboBox"
                        items="{glModel>/glDataSet}"
                        selectionChange="onGlDataSetComboBoxSelectionChange"
                        placeholder="Select GL Account">
                        <core:Item key="{glModel>gl}" text="{glModel>gl}" />
                    </ComboBox>
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin">
                    <Label text="Posting Date" />
                    <DateRangeSelection change="onDateRangeSelectionChange" />
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin">
                    <Label text="Created By" />
                    <ComboBox
                        id="idUserDataSetComboBox"
                        items="{userModel>/userDataSet}"
                        selectionChange="onUserDataSetComboBoxSelectionChange"
                        placeholder="Select Created By">
                        <core:Item key="{userModel>user}" text="{userModel>user}" />
                    </ComboBox>
                </VBox>
                <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin">
                    <Button type="Emphasized" text="Go" press="onGoButtonPress" />
                </VBox>
            </HBox>
        </uxap:headerContent>
        <uxap:sections>
            <uxap:ObjectPageSection
                showTitle="false"
                class="sapUiLargeMarginTopBottom">
                <uxap:subSections>
                    <uxap:ObjectPageSubSection>
                        <VBox>
                            <Table
                                sticky="ColumnHeaders"
                                id="idZglLineItemsTable"
                                items="{
                                    path: '/ZGL_LINE_ITEMS',
                                    filters: [
                                        {
                                            path: 'CreatedBy',
                                            operator: 'NE',
                                            value1: 'SAP_SYSTEM'
                                        },
                                        {
                                            path: 'GlAccount',
                                            operator: 'EQ',
                                            value1: '10010000'
                                        }
                                    ],
                                    sorter: {
                                        path: 'PostingDate',
                                        descending: true
                                    }
                                }"
                                growing="true"
                                growingThreshold="200"
                                alternateRowColors="true"
                                growingTriggerText="Load More"
                                noDataText="No data found"
                                mode="SingleSelectMaster"
                                updateFinished="onTableUpdateFinished">
                                <columns>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Date" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Journal Entry" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="G/L Acc." />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Description" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Opp. G/L Acc." />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="Amount" />
                                    </Column>
                                    <Column>
                                        <Text text="CreatedBy" />
                                    </Column>
                                </columns>
                                <items>
                                    <ColumnListItem>
                                        <cells>
                                            <Text text="{PostingDate}" />
                                            <Text text="{AccDoc}" />
                                            <Text text="{GlAccount}" />
                                            <Text text="{Description}" />
                                            <Text text="{OpposingGLAccount}" />
                                            <Text text="{AmountInJournalEntry}" />
                                            <Text text="{CreatedByDesc}" />
                                        </cells>
                                    </ColumnListItem>
                                </items>
                            </Table>

                        </VBox>
                    </uxap:ObjectPageSubSection>
                </uxap:subSections>
            </uxap:ObjectPageSection>
        </uxap:sections>
        <uxap:footer>
            <OverflowToolbar>
                <ToolbarSpacer />
                <Button
                    type="Emphasized"
                    text="Export PDF"
                    press="onExportPDFButtonPress" />
            </OverflowToolbar>
        </uxap:footer>
    </uxap:ObjectPageLayout>
</mvc:View>

### Main.controller.js

sap.ui.define(
    [
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller',
        'sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel',
        'sap/ui/model/Filter',
        'sap/ui/model/FilterOperator',
    ],
    function (Controller, JSONModel, Filter, FilterOperator, PdfmakeMin, vfs_fonts) {
        'use strict';

        return Controller.extend('laporankas.laporankas.controller.Main', {
            onInit: function () {
                const oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel(); // Get the OData V4 model

                if (!oModel) {
                    console.error('OData V4 Model is not available.');
                    return;
                }

                // Define filters
                const client = this._getClientFromURL();
                const glAccount = client === '080' ? '0010010000' : '0011010020';

                const aFilters = [
                    new Filter('GlAccount', FilterOperator.EQ, glAccount),
                    new Filter('CreatedBy', FilterOperator.NE, 'SAP_SYSTEM'), // Example filter for CompanyCode
                ];

                // Bind the entity set with filters
                const oListBinding = oModel.bindList('/ZGL_LINE_ITEMS', undefined, undefined, aFilters);

                // Fetch filtered data
                oListBinding
                    .requestContexts()
                    .then((aContexts) => {
                        const aData = aContexts.map((oContext) => oContext.getObject());
                        console.log('Filtered Data:', aData); // Log the filtered data to the console
                    })
                    .catch((oError) => {
                        console.error('Error Fetching Data:', oError); // Log any errors
                    });
            },

            _getClientFromURL: function () {
                const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
                return urlParams.get('sap-client') || '080'; // Default client
            }
        });
    },
);


### Example CDS result when I run in Eclipse

AccDocPostingDateGlAccountOpposing GlAccountAmount In Journal Item
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000
1000001452024-12-301001000061012100500000

### The Issue (Result when the data bound in SAPUI5 App)

##### Here is the first result:

AccDocPostingDateGlAccountOpposing GlAccountAmount In Journal Item
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000
1000001452024-12-301001000065301000700000

##### Here is the second result when I refresh:

AccDocPostingDateGlAccountOpposing GlAccountAmount In Journal Item
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000
1000001452024-12-301001000063009000400000

### What I've done to solve the issue
- I tried to hit the entity endpoint in the browser/Postman, and I got the correct result as in Eclipse, which makes me a little bit confused.
- I tried to console.log it from the controller, but the result is not correct (duplicated).

Please let me know if there's something wrong with the CDS I created or my configuration in my SAPUI5 App or let me know if there's anything I need to do to solve this issue. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: how to consume ODATA while performing CRUD operation...
entry.content:
Hi. @shrutikah

"Employees" entity set is read-only.
so Create, Update, and Delete operation are not possible,
only Read operation is possible.

For more information, please refer to the link below.
https://services.odata.org/v2/

Additionally,
OData Protocol exists up to V2, V3, and V4.
but SAPUI5 Framework only supports V2 and V4.

I hope for good results!

entry.title: Issue with hasdraftentity in sap cap odata v4
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have worked on list report based on SAP CAP, when i select any line item i get below error, Any suggestions are appreciated

Error : Failed to drill-down into (ID=48243eff-54a4-4e0d-b7b6-5f11057bc663,IsActiveEntity=true)/HasDraftEntity, invalid segment: HasDraftEntity - monitor/Invoices?$count=true

Error : Failed to drill-down into (ID=48243eff-54a4-4e0d-b7b6-5f11057bc663,IsActiveEntity=true)/DraftAdministrativeData, invalid segment: DraftAdministrativeData - monitor/Invoices?$count=true&$orderby=IssueDate%20desc

entry.title: How to create mdc.table with OData V4 application
entry.content:
Hello. I have a question.

While I am familiar with the JSON Model tutorial provided in the UI5 SDK, I am eager to learn more about developing applications using OData v4.

I understand the concepts of Delegates and PropertyInfo, but I'm facing some challenges in implementing them.

Could you please provide me with a simple example or guide to help me get started?

entry.title: Converting Xstring received from ABAP to byte Array of PDF to send via Rest API in java
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a variable of type String in java, which has XSTRING value of PDF received from ERP.
I have to convert this string in byte array, which I can send via rest API.
Please help me with utility function which I can use for this conversion.

entry.title: ONB2ProcessResponsible,ONB2ProcessTask,PickListValueV2 is not found
entry.content:
Good day, Seniors,

Candidate is unable to complete/submit "Complete Your E-Signature" task during the onboarding (2.O) process. when admin try Nudge from onboarding dashboard getting following error, please help me.

Error

Entity ONB2ProcessOverview,ONB2ActivityOverview,ONB2ActivityResponsible,getOnboardingBPEUserTaskStatus,ONB2Process,ONB2DataCollectionUserConfig,PerEmail,PicklistOption,User,PickListV2,ONB2BuddyActivity,ONB2EquipmentActivity,ONB2EquipmentType,ONB2EquipmentTypeValue,Attachment,ONB2GoalActivity,ONB2Goal,ONB2GoalCategoryConfig,ONB2LinkActivity,ONB2Link,ONB2LinkConfig,ONB2MeetingActivity,ONB2MeetingEvent,ONB2CentralMeetingEvent,ONB2MeetingParticipant,ONB2CentralOrientationMeeting,ONB2MeetingTypeConfig,ONB2OffboardingMeetingTypeConfig,ONB2MessageActivity,ONB2ActivitiesConfig,ONB2ScheduledMessageActivity,ONB2MessageRecipient,ONB2OffboardingActivitiesConfig,ONB2UsefulContactActivity,ONB2UsefulContact,ONB2WhatToBringActivity,ONB2WhatToBringConfig,ONB2WhatToBringItemConfig,ONB2ChecklistActivity,ONB2ChecklistItem,ONB2AssetActivity,ONB2AssetActivityFieldControls,ONB2Asset,ONB2AssetCategoryConfig,ONB2EquipmentType,ONB2EquipmentTypeValue,ComplianceProcess,ComplianceProcessTask,ComplianceProcessResponsible,ComplianceProcessTaskType,MDFEnumValue,I9UserData,restartOnboardingProcess,getOnboardingDocuments,getBPEUserTaskUrl,getBPETodoUserTaskUrl,ONB2WhereToGoActivity,ONB2ActivityNudgeDetails,ONB2ProcessResponsible,ONB2ProcessTask,PickListValueV2 is not found. Please contact your system administrator.

entry.title: Unable to use PATCH method to Update Production Order Component using OData Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Currently i am working on a scenario where the requirement is to update the Production Order Components values from a Third Party software, I am using OData Service: 
 https://{domain}:{port}/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/A_ProductionOrderComponent_3(Reservation=%27125%27,ReservationItem=%273%27,ReservationRecordType=%27531%27)

and testing it with the payload (shared below) : 

{
    "d": {
        "ManufacturingOrder": " 6000004",
        "ManufacturingOrderSequence": "0",
        "ManufacturingOrderOperation": "0010",
        "BOMItem": "6",
        "BOMItemCategory": "L",
        "BillOfMaterialItemNumber": "0030",
        "RequiredQuantity": "5",
        "StorageLocation": "FG01",
        "Batch": "0000000895"
    }   
}

In Postman, I am getting error as HTTP Status Code 400 with Error Text as 

Malformed URI literal syntax



CSRF : Used 
Etag i found from getting the metadata through browser. 

As referred to SAP API Hub it is having 3 fields as mandatory which are : 1. ReservationItem 2. ReservationItem 3. ReservationRecordType

But not able to find the 3rd field which is ReservationRecordType also kindly provide your feedbacks / solution on this. 


Thanks & Regards, 
Prathmesh

entry.title: How to obtain the job posting apply url
entry.content:
Hi,
Could you please provide the field name for the Apply URL in the JobRequisitionPosting entity or any other entity that contains the applyUrl field? I was unable to find a corresponding field for the URL in the entity.Additionally, could you guide us on how to retrieve the posting URL? I have referred to the documentation available here, but it does not seem to clarify this aspect.I understand that others have encountered a similar issue, but I couldn’t find a concrete solution in the resources available. Your guidance on resolving this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Unable to POST Workforce Timesheet using OData Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am working on a scenario where the requirement is to create timesheet of an employee in the SAP Public Cloud System. 

I referred to api.sap.com for the standard OData Service (https://api.sap.com/api/API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET/tryout)

As per the documentation i am posting this JSON payload : 

{
   "TimeSheetDataFields": {
      "ActivityType": "8",
      "WBSElement": "ADAPTIVE ROYALITY",
      "TimeSheetTaskType": "MISC",
      "TimeSheetNote": "THIS IS TEST NOTE",
      "RecordedHours": "9"
   },
   "TimeSheetDate": "2025-01-02T00:00:00",
   "TimeSheetIsReleasedOnSave": true
}

 But i am not able to see the response in Postman even if the response code is HTTP 200 OK

Please provide your valuable feedbacks. 


Best Regards, 
Prathmesh Sutar

entry.title: Issue: Data Not Displaying on CDS Endpoint Despite Presence in HANA Table
entry.content:
The Issue:

While working with SAP S/4HANA or SAP Cloud Platform, I encountered an issue where data in the HANA database table is not visible via the CDS endpoint, despite the data being present and accessible directly from the HANA table.


Here's a summary of the issue:

  • The data exists in the HANA table (Attached an image below).
  • A CDS view is defined to expose the data via an OData endpoint.
  • The OData service is properly registered, and the metadata is available.
  • However, when consuming the OData service, no data is returned, even though it should be.

 

 

Troubleshooting Steps We Tried:

Here are the troubleshooting steps we attempted to resolve the issue:

  1. Clearing Cache and Restarting Services
  2. Reviewing the CDS View Definition
  3. Verifying Service Registration
  4. Checking User Authorization

Investigating HANA CLI Query Results

Seeking Help from the SAP Community:

As I have encountered this issue in my own project, I would like to reach out to the SAP community for assistance. If anyone has experienced this problem or has insights on what might be causing this discrepancy, your input would be greatly appreciated.


I would love to hear from anyone in the SAP community who has encountered this issue before. Please share your insights, troubleshooting tips, or solutions to help resolve this issue. Your input will be invaluable in understanding and overcoming this challenge.

SAP Community

Node.js 

SAP HANA Cloud 

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP

entry.title: Public Cloud - Consume local service/API in ABAP code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a situation where we need to create a Sales Order using ABAP code in a Public Cloud system. We are not able to use the standard BO because the payment plan entities (which we need) are not available in I_SALESORDERTP, so the only solution we found is to use the api API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.

We tried building a solution following this tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html

But we weren’t able to make it work since I believe the tutorial is missing the communication arrangement part, which is needed to handle the connection.

We then followed the 2nd part of the tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-basic-auth.html

Which is working and creating the sales order as expected, but the problem is that is creating it with the communication user as the owner (CreatedBy field).

Is there a way to consume the API o the odata service associated in a local mode using the same user that is logged into the system? In our process the creator of the order is very important and we can’t have the communication user as creator of every sales order in the system.

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journey exercises - Error with OData Adapter
entry.content:
Hi,

I've been making my way through the Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journey exercises and am having issues with my OData Adapter.

I followed the steps by creating an external Receiver and an external call for Request Reply.

I then dragged the connection line between the two and selected the OData Adapter Type and OData V2 Message Protocol.

I filled in the configuration details as per the instructions and used the API Proxy URL that I had gained through previous exercises.

However when I save and deploy the Integration Flow I get the following Error and am not sure what it's telling me:

java.lang.NullPointerException: while trying to invoke the method com.sap.it.rt.adapter.odata.destination.facade.SecureStoreRetrieveService.getSecureStore() of a null object returned from com.sap.it.rt.adapter.odata.destination.facade.SecureStoreRetrieveServiceImpl.getInstance()

Does anyone know what I might be missing, or am possibly doing wrong to get this error?

Thanks.

entry.title: APIs for Warehousing - OData v4. Count Physical Inventory issue.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the Physical Inventory API in my BTP Application and want to perform the COUNT as described in the link. Unfortunately, I am having some troubles with it, therefore I want to understand how it is supposed to work.

To be able to perform an Inventory COUNT I have to have a Inventory Document, which I created in my SAP EWM System as we can see below.

I notice that there exists a Physical Inventory Item ( Header Item ) for this document, but no Count Item ( since I did not perform the count yet ).

To perform the COUNT I implemented the BATCH call as mentioned in the Dokumentation and when I am executing it, I get following error:

"This physical inventory item doesn't exist."

This lead to my question: 

Since the BATCH call requires this two PUT calls in it.

How can the BATCH call require a PUT request of the Physical Inventory Count Item, if the Item does not exists yet?

entry.title: Repack Products into Handling Units or Storage Bins in EWM-Managed Storage Location
entry.content:
Hello!
I have some troubles while using the Handling Unit API. I try to Repack Products as described ( https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e1841426f60f4e50913ec9a64aba8332/2e4fa69034674856a3a201c0c14bdd65.html?locale=en-US&version=2022.002 ). When executing the action, I always get the error message “ISO Code and Language Code &PC& do not match”. PC is the HandlingUnitQuantityUnit parameter, which I am using to call the function. Using different parameters leads to the same error.
Does anyone have an idea what exactly is the problem and how to solve it?
Thanks for your help.
